package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for ticker_without_stop: time.NewTicker(...) is created without an observed Stop() call.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: idioms; severity: info.
func scenario399Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	client := &http.Client{}
	return client.Get(url)
}
